title: Debug a failing or flaky CI job
description: Reproduce locally, isolate the failing step, and separate code failures from runner/cache/env nondeterminism.
body: Steps: 1. Open the job logs and find the first failing step (not just the last red line). 2. Re-run with debug logging (ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG) to see expanded commands and env. 3. Determine whether it is code (fails locally too), environment (runner image/tool version drift), or cache (stale restore) by clearing the cache and pinning the runner image. 4. Reproduce in a minimal branch with the same matrix leg. 5. Fix the root cause, not the symptom (e.g. pin a tool version rather than retry). Rollback point: the branch under test. Validation: the job passes deterministically across reruns, not just once.
